import openpyxl
from openpyxl.styles import Font, PatternFill, Alignment, Border, Side, NamedStyle
from openpyxl.utils import get_column_letter
from openpyxl.worksheet.datavalidation import DataValidation

wb = openpyxl.Workbook\(\)

# ── Colors ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
HEADER_FILL   = PatternFill\(start_color="1F4E79", end_color="1F4E79", fill_type="solid"\)
HEADER_FONT   = Font\(bold=True, color="FFFFFF", size=11, name="Calibri"\)
DONE_FILL     = PatternFill\(start_color="E2EFDA", end_color="E2EFDA", fill_type="solid"\)
ALT_FILL      = PatternFill\(start_color="F2F2F2", end_color="F2F2F2", fill_type="solid"\)
WHITE_FILL    = PatternFill\(start_color="FFFFFF", end_color="FFFFFF", fill_type="solid"\)

# Status fills
TODO_FILL       = PatternFill\(start_color="FFC7CE", end_color="FFC7CE", fill_type="solid"\)  # light red
INPROG_FILL     = PatternFill\(start_color="FFEB9C", end_color="FFEB9C", fill_type="solid"\)  # light yellow
DONE_STATUS_FILL= PatternFill\(start_color="C6EFCE", end_color="C6EFCE", fill_type="solid"\)  # light green
BLOCKED_FILL    = PatternFill\(start_color="C00000", end_color="C00000", fill_type="solid"\)   # dark red

# Priority fonts
HIGH_FONT   = Font\(bold=True, color="C00000", size=10, name="Calibri"\)
MEDIUM_FONT = Font\(bold=True, color="ED7D31", size=10, name="Calibri"\)
LOW_FONT    = Font\(bold=True, color="548235", size=10, name="Calibri"\)

# Status fonts
TODO_FONT    = Font\(bold=True, color="9C0006", size=10, name="Calibri"\)
INPROG_FONT  = Font\(bold=True, color="9C6500", size=10, name="Calibri"\)
DONE_ST_FONT = Font\(bold=True, color="006100", size=10, name="Calibri"\)
BLOCKED_FONT = Font\(bold=True, color="FFFFFF", size=10, name="Calibri"\)

DEFAULT_FONT = Font\(size=10, name="Calibri"\)

THIN_BORDER = Border\(
    left=Side\(style="thin", color="B4B4B4"\),
    right=Side\(style="thin", color="B4B4B4"\),
    top=Side\(style="thin", color="B4B4B4"\),
    bottom=Side\(style="thin", color="B4B4B4"\),
\)

# ── Column definitions ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────
HEADERS = [
    "#", "Title", "Category", "Priority", "Status",
    "Assigned To", "Area", "Description", "Files to Check",
    "Notes / Updates", "Date Started", "Date Completed",
]
COL_WIDTHS = [5, 35, 15, 10, 14, 15, 20, 45, 40, 35, 13, 15]

# ── Data ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
ISSUES = [
    # \(#, Title, Category, Priority, Status, Assigned, Area, Description, Files, Notes, Started, Completed\)
    \(1, "Fix 3 emails on phase pass", "Bug", "HIGH", "DONE", "", "Backend",
     "Three emails are being sent when a user passes a phase instead of one",
     "", "", "", ""\),
    \(2, "Daily balance not resetting", "Bug", "HIGH", "TODO", "", "Backend",
     "Daily balance/equity snapshot is not resetting at the start of each new trading day",
     "", "", "", ""\),
    \(3, "Duplicate trades detection & cleanup script", "Bug", "MEDIUM", "TODO", "", "Backend",
     "Duplicate trades appearing in the system; need detection logic and a cleanup script",
     "", "", "", ""\),
    \(4, "Incorrect balance on dashboard", "Bug", "HIGH", "TODO", "", "Backend/Dashboard",
     "Dashboard shows incorrect balance that doesn't match the MT5 account balance",
     "", "", "", ""\),
    \(5, "Password change not reflecting in dashboard", "Bug", "HIGH", "TODO", "", "Backend",
     "When user changes password, the change is not reflected or applied correctly in the dashboard",
     "", "", "", ""\),
    \(6, "Balance/equity N/A in breach email", "Bug", "MEDIUM", "DONE", "", "pft-rule-checker",
     "Breach notification emails show N/A for balance and equity values",
     "", "", "", ""\),
    \(7, "MT5 trades not matching dashboard trading history", "Bug", "HIGH", "TODO", "", "Backend/Dashboard",
     "Trades executed on MT5 do not match what is displayed in the dashboard trading history",
     "", "", "", ""\),
    \(8, "Implement the Leaderboard", "Feature", "MEDIUM", "TODO", "", "Backend/Dashboard",
     "Build a leaderboard feature to display top-performing traders",
     "", "", "", ""\),
    \(9, "Free Trial feature", "Feature", "MEDIUM", "TODO", "", "Backend/Dashboard",
     "Implement free trial accounts so users can try the platform before purchasing",
     "", "", "", ""\),
    \(10, "KYC/Contract gate on funded phase emails", "Bug", "HIGH", "TODO", "", "Backend",
     "Funded phase emails should be gated behind KYC/contract completion",
     "", "", "", ""\),
    \(11, "Daily limit reset not working", "Bug", "HIGH", "TODO", "", "Backend",
     "Daily trading limits are not resetting properly at the configured reset time",
     "", "", "", ""\),
    \(12, "Add account link on admin payout page", "Feature", "LOW", "TODO", "", "Dashboard",
     "Add a clickable account link/reference on the admin payout management page",
     "", "", "", ""\),
    \(13, "Account chain - linked phase accounts", "Feature", "MEDIUM", "TODO", "", "Backend/Dashboard",
     "Link accounts across phases so the full journey of a trader is visible in one chain",
     "", "", "", ""\),
    \(14, "Configurable certificates per prop firm", "Feature", "MEDIUM", "TODO", "", "Backend",
     "Allow each prop firm \(white-label\) to configure their own certificate templates and branding",
     "", "", "", ""\),
    \(15, "Broker group migration script", "Feature", "MEDIUM", "TODO", "", "Backend",
     "Script to migrate users/accounts between broker groups when broker config changes",
     "", "", "", ""\),
    \(16, "Easy Funding checkout page", "Feature", "LOW", "TODO", "", "Backend/Dashboard",
     "Build a streamlined checkout page for the Easy Funding product",
     "", "", "", ""\),
    \(17, "Clarify withdrawal requests per account", "Feature", "MEDIUM", "DONE", "", "Backend/Dashboard",
     "Make withdrawal requests clearly scoped per account to avoid confusion",
     "", "", "", ""\),
    # External / Non-Code items
    \(18, "Setup TradingCult", "External/Non-Code", "MEDIUM", "TODO", "", "External",
     "Set up and configure TradingCult integration/platform",
     "", "", "", ""\),
    \(19, "Confirm certificate config with FO/Fitim", "External/Non-Code", "MEDIUM", "TODO", "", "External",
     "Reach out to FO/Fitim to confirm certificate configuration and branding requirements",
     "", "", "", ""\),
    \(20, "Follow up with Broker for easyfunding accounts", "External/Non-Code", "MEDIUM", "TODO", "", "External",
     "Follow up with the broker to get Easy Funding accounts provisioned",
     "", "", "", ""\),
    \(21, "Ask broker about swap/spread info", "External/Non-Code", "LOW", "TODO", "", "External",
     "Request detailed swap and spread information from the broker for documentation",
     "", "", "", ""\),
    \(22, "Ask broker about wti-cash1 trading", "External/Non-Code", "LOW", "TODO", "", "External",
     "Confirm with broker whether wti-cash1 instrument trading is supported and any restrictions",
     "", "", "", ""\),
    \(23, "$3 commission per lot for FO group", "Feature", "MEDIUM", "TODO", "", "Backend",
     "Implement $3 per lot commission configuration for the FO broker group",
     "", "", "", ""\),
]

# ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
#  SHEET 1: Issues & Tasks
# ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
ws1 = wb.active
ws1.title = "Issues & Tasks"
ws1.sheet_properties.tabColor = "1F4E79"

# Write header
for col_idx, header in enumerate\(HEADERS, 1\):
    cell = ws1.cell\(row=1, column=col_idx, value=header\)
    cell.font = HEADER_FONT
    cell.fill = HEADER_FILL
    cell.alignment = Alignment\(horizontal="center", vertical="center", wrap_text=True\)
    cell.border = THIN_BORDER

# Set column widths
for col_idx, width in enumerate\(COL_WIDTHS, 1\):
    ws1.column_dimensions[get_column_letter\(col_idx\)].width = width

# Freeze header row
ws1.freeze_panes = "A2"

# Add auto-filter
ws1.auto_filter.ref = f"A1:L{len\(ISSUES\) + 1}"

# Data validation for Status \(column E\)
status_dv = DataValidation\(
    type="list",
    formula1='"TODO,IN PROGRESS,DONE,BLOCKED"',
    allow_blank=True,
    showErrorMessage=True,
    errorTitle="Invalid Status",
    error="Please select: TODO, IN PROGRESS, DONE, or BLOCKED",
    showInputMessage=True,
    promptTitle="Status",
    prompt="Select a status from the dropdown",
\)
ws1.add_data_validation\(status_dv\)

# Data validation for Priority \(column D\)
priority_dv = DataValidation\(
    type="list",
    formula1='"HIGH,MEDIUM,LOW"',
    allow_blank=True,
    showErrorMessage=True,
    errorTitle="Invalid Priority",
    error="Please select: HIGH, MEDIUM, or LOW",
    showInputMessage=True,
    promptTitle="Priority",
    prompt="Select a priority from the dropdown",
\)
ws1.add_data_validation\(priority_dv\)

# Data validation for Category \(column C\)
category_dv = DataValidation\(
    type="list",
    formula1='"Bug,Feature,External/Non-Code"',
    allow_blank=True,
\)
ws1.add_data_validation\(category_dv\)

# Write data rows
for row_offset, issue in enumerate\(ISSUES\):
    row_num = row_offset + 2  # data starts at row 2
    is_done = issue[4] == "DONE"
    is_alt = \(row_offset % 2 == 1\)  # alternating rows

    for col_idx, value in enumerate\(issue, 1\):
        cell = ws1.cell\(row=row_num, column=col_idx, value=value\)
        cell.font = DEFAULT_FONT
        cell.border = THIN_BORDER

        # Base row fill: done → green, else alternate white/gray
        if is_done:
            cell.fill = DONE_FILL
        elif is_alt:
            cell.fill = ALT_FILL
        else:
            cell.fill = WHITE_FILL

        # Column-specific alignment
        if col_idx == 1:  # #
            cell.alignment = Alignment\(horizontal="center", vertical="center"\)
        elif col_idx in \(3, 4, 5, 6, 7, 11, 12\):  # center-ish columns
            cell.alignment = Alignment\(horizontal="center", vertical="center", wrap_text=True\)
        elif col_idx in \(8, 9, 10\):  # Description, Files, Notes → wrap
            cell.alignment = Alignment\(vertical="top", wrap_text=True\)
        else:
            cell.alignment = Alignment\(vertical="center", wrap_text=True\)

        # Priority font color \(col D = 4\)
        if col_idx == 4:
            if value == "HIGH":
                cell.font = HIGH_FONT
            elif value == "MEDIUM":
                cell.font = MEDIUM_FONT
            elif value == "LOW":
                cell.font = LOW_FONT

        # Status fill + font \(col E = 5\)
        if col_idx == 5:
            if value == "TODO":
                cell.fill = TODO_FILL
                cell.font = TODO_FONT
            elif value == "IN PROGRESS":
                cell.fill = INPROG_FILL
                cell.font = INPROG_FONT
            elif value == "DONE":
                cell.fill = DONE_STATUS_FILL
                cell.font = DONE_ST_FONT
            elif value == "BLOCKED":
                cell.fill = BLOCKED_FILL
                cell.font = BLOCKED_FONT

    # Add data validation references for this row
    status_dv.add\(ws1.cell\(row=row_num, column=5\)\)
    priority_dv.add\(ws1.cell\(row=row_num, column=4\)\)
    category_dv.add\(ws1.cell\(row=row_num, column=3\)\)

# Add 20 extra blank rows with formatting + validation for future entries
for extra in range\(len\(ISSUES\) + 2, len\(ISSUES\) + 22\):
    is_alt = \(\(extra - 2\) % 2 == 1\)
    for col_idx in range\(1, len\(HEADERS\) + 1\):
        cell = ws1.cell\(row=extra, column=col_idx\)
        cell.border = THIN_BORDER
        cell.font = DEFAULT_FONT
        if is_alt:
            cell.fill = ALT_FILL
        else:
            cell.fill = WHITE_FILL
        if col_idx in \(8, 9, 10\):
            cell.alignment = Alignment\(vertical="top", wrap_text=True\)
        elif col_idx == 1:
            cell.alignment = Alignment\(horizontal="center", vertical="center"\)
        elif col_idx in \(3, 4, 5, 6, 7, 11, 12\):
            cell.alignment = Alignment\(horizontal="center", vertical="center", wrap_text=True\)
        else:
            cell.alignment = Alignment\(vertical="center", wrap_text=True\)

    status_dv.add\(ws1.cell\(row=extra, column=5\)\)
    priority_dv.add\(ws1.cell\(row=extra, column=4\)\)
    category_dv.add\(ws1.cell\(row=extra, column=3\)\)

# Set row height for header
ws1.row_dimensions[1].height = 28
for r in range\(2, len\(ISSUES\) + 22\):
    ws1.row_dimensions[r].height = 22

# ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
#  SHEET 2: New Issues
# ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
ws2 = wb.create_sheet\("New Issues"\)
ws2.sheet_properties.tabColor = "ED7D31"

# Write header
for col_idx, header in enumerate\(HEADERS, 1\):
    cell = ws2.cell\(row=1, column=col_idx, value=header\)
    cell.font = HEADER_FONT
    cell.fill = HEADER_FILL
    cell.alignment = Alignment\(horizontal="center", vertical="center", wrap_text=True\)
    cell.border = THIN_BORDER

# Set column widths
for col_idx, width in enumerate\(COL_WIDTHS, 1\):
    ws2.column_dimensions[get_column_letter\(col_idx\)].width = width

# Freeze header
ws2.freeze_panes = "A2"

# Auto-filter
ws2.auto_filter.ref = "A1:L1"

# Data validations for Sheet 2
status_dv2 = DataValidation\(
    type="list",
    formula1='"TODO,IN PROGRESS,DONE,BLOCKED"',
    allow_blank=True,
    showErrorMessage=True,
    errorTitle="Invalid Status",
    error="Please select: TODO, IN PROGRESS, DONE, or BLOCKED",
    showInputMessage=True,
    promptTitle="Status",
    prompt="Select a status from the dropdown",
\)
ws2.add_data_validation\(status_dv2\)

priority_dv2 = DataValidation\(
    type="list",
    formula1='"HIGH,MEDIUM,LOW"',
    allow_blank=True,
    showErrorMessage=True,
    errorTitle="Invalid Priority",
    error="Please select: HIGH, MEDIUM, or LOW",
    showInputMessage=True,
    promptTitle="Priority",
    prompt="Select a priority from the dropdown",
\)
ws2.add_data_validation\(priority_dv2\)

category_dv2 = DataValidation\(
    type="list",
    formula1='"Bug,Feature,External/Non-Code"',
    allow_blank=True,
\)
ws2.add_data_validation\(category_dv2\)

# Pre-format 50 blank rows for new issues
ws2.row_dimensions[1].height = 28
for r in range\(2, 52\):
    is_alt = \(\(r - 2\) % 2 == 1\)
    ws2.row_dimensions[r].height = 22
    for col_idx in range\(1, len\(HEADERS\) + 1\):
        cell = ws2.cell\(row=r, column=col_idx\)
        cell.border = THIN_BORDER
        cell.font = DEFAULT_FONT
        if is_alt:
            cell.fill = ALT_FILL
        else:
            cell.fill = WHITE_FILL
        if col_idx in \(8, 9, 10\):
            cell.alignment = Alignment\(vertical="top", wrap_text=True\)
        elif col_idx == 1:
            cell.alignment = Alignment\(horizontal="center", vertical="center"\)
        elif col_idx in \(3, 4, 5, 6, 7, 11, 12\):
            cell.alignment = Alignment\(horizontal="center", vertical="center", wrap_text=True\)
        else:
            cell.alignment = Alignment\(vertical="center", wrap_text=True\)

    status_dv2.add\(ws2.cell\(row=r, column=5\)\)
    priority_dv2.add\(ws2.cell\(row=r, column=4\)\)
    category_dv2.add\(ws2.cell\(row=r, column=3\)\)

# ── Save ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
output_path = "/Users/klev/Code/PFT-WhiteLabel-v2-staging/pft-dashboard/docs/HACKATHON-TRACKER.xlsx"
wb.save\(output_path\)
print\(f"✅ Saved: {output_path}"\)
print\(f"   Sheet 1: 'Issues & Tasks' — {len\(ISSUES\)} issues + 20 blank rows"\)
print\(f"   Sheet 2: 'New Issues' — blank template with 50 rows"\)
PYEOF)
